content_body: The cabin was very nice and spacious, and it was extremely convenient to be able to just show up and have all the linens, towels, and paper products included. It gave us less things to pack and less to have to buy once we got there. The views from the decks were beautiful as well. There were also lots of large windows so even sitting on the couch you could still see the trees. There was a lot for the kids to do in the cabin in the evenings as well. We enjoyed our stay!
title: We Enjoyed Our Stay!
